tasks.label: Clean Build
tasks.detail: Remove build directory and reconfigure CMake

tasks.label: Flash
tasks.command: cmake --build /workspace/build/Debug-rp2350 && scp /workspace/build/Debug-rp2350/*.uf2 rock@100.115.224.114:~/firmware.uf2 && ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 'sudo fuser -k /dev/ttyOBC 2>/dev/null; sudo picotool load -f ~/firmware.uf2'
tasks.detail: Build, transfer to Rock Pi, and flash via picotool

tasks.label: Flash (Skip Build)
tasks.command: scp /workspace/build/Debug-rp2350/*.uf2 rock@100.115.224.114:~/firmware.uf2 && ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 'sudo fuser -k /dev/ttyOBC 2>/dev/null; sudo picotool load -f ~/firmware.uf2'

tasks.label: Monitor
tasks.command: ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 'sudo fuser -k /dev/ttyOBC 2>/dev/null; sudo rm -f /var/lock/LCK..ttyOBC; sleep 0.5; minicom -D /dev/ttyOBC -b 115200'

tasks.label: Flash and Monitor
tasks.detail: Build, flash, then open serial monitor
